title: anaphalis gracilis var. aspera
intro: Anaphalis gracilis var. aspera, also known as asperan anaphalis or rough woolly meadowmat, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic activities. The health benefits of Anaphalis gracilis var. aspera include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Anaphalis gracilis var. aspera can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
